name: Cyberark Duplicate Account Emails
description: Detects duplicate active cyberark accounts sharing the same email identity.
query: SELECT LOWER(TRIM(u.email)) AS email, COUNT(*) AS account_count FROM cyberark_users u WHERE COALESCE(u.active, true) = true AND COALESCE(TRIM(u.email), '') != '' GROUP BY LOWER(TRIM(u.email)) HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
remediation: Consolidate duplicate identities and remove unintended duplicate access paths.
